pattern: With only increments allowed, every element must climb to the current maximum, so the answer is simply the total gap below that maximum.
hints: You can only raise values, never lower them, so the shared final value cannot be below the largest element.
Raising the target above the maximum only adds wasted moves, so the maximum itself is the cheapest common value.
Sum max(nums) minus each element to get the total number of single increments needed.

stress.description: random arrays within the stated bounds
